assertions.title: Streamlit app loads with controls (strategy selector, date picker, Run Backtest button)

steps.observed: Streamlit app loaded successfully with title 'A-Share Quantitative Trading Dashboard'

steps.expected: Strategy selector, date picker, Run Backtest button visible
steps.observed: Sidebar shows: Strategy dropdown (chan_theory selected), Start Date (2025/12/25), End Date (2026/03/25), Initial Capital (¥1,000,000), and '🚀 Run Backtest' button
Backtest completed with message '✅ Backtest complete! 4 trades executed.'
No error banners or exception messages visible
No console errors reported
Strategy combobox shows 'chan_theory' as selected value (annotated screenshot ref @e2: combobox 'Selected chan_theory. Strategy')

assertions.title: Backtest runs and shows progress (spinner/progress bar)

steps.observed: Backtest ran and showed status messages: 'Loaded 422 stocks from market.db' (info banner) followed by '✅ Backtest complete! 4 trades executed.' (success banner). The backtest completed within ~2 seconds — progress bar was transient.
Screenshot captured after 2s delay shows completion state with status banners. The progress bar/spinner was too fast to capture but the status messages confirm progress was shown.

assertions.issues: Progress indicator (spinner/progress bar) was transient and completed within ~2 seconds, so the in-progress state was not captured in the screenshot. However, status messages ('Loaded 422 stocks from market.db' and '✅ Backtest complete! 4 trades executed.') confirm the backtest ran and showed progress feedback.

assertions.title: NAV chart displays with strategy equity curve

steps.expected: NAV chart visible with strategy equity curve
steps.observed: Chart titled '📈 Net Asset Value — Strategy vs Benchmarks' displayed with Plotly interactive chart showing Chan Theory equity curve (blue solid line) from Dec 2025 to Mar 2026, Y-axis labeled 'Net Asset Value (¥)'

assertions.title: Trade list table shows individual trades

steps.observed: Trade List table displayed with columns: Stock, Entry Date, Exit Date, Entry Price, Exit Price, P&L, P&L%, Hold Days. 4 trades shown: 300373 (Entry: 2026-02-05, P&L: ¥-54,655.48, -18.37%, 47 days), 000738 (Entry: 2026-02-06, P&L: ¥-57,230.54, -19.38%, 46 days), 600519 (Entry: 2026-02-24, P&L: ¥-12,347.92, -4.21%, 28 days), 600549 (Entry: 2026-02-24, P&L: ¥-7,885.67, -6.94%, 28 days)

assertions.title: Performance metrics displayed — MUST include Sortino Ratio, Sharpe Ratio, Max Drawdown, Win Rate (NOT CAGR)

steps.action: Check Performance Summary section after backtest completion
steps.expected: 6 metric cards: Total Return, Sortino Ratio, Sharpe Ratio, Max Drawdown, Win Rate, Trade Count
steps.observed: Performance Summary section shows exactly 6 metric cards: Total Return (-13.10%), Sortino Ratio (-3.220), Sharpe Ratio (-2.940), Max Drawdown (-19.00%), Win Rate (0.0%), Trade Count (4). CONFIRMED: 'Sortino Ratio' is displayed (NOT 'CAGR'). Fix from commit 017652f verified.

assertions.title: CSI 300 benchmark line on NAV chart

steps.action: Check NAV chart for CSI 300 benchmark line
steps.expected: CSI 300 benchmark line overlaid on NAV chart
steps.observed: NAV chart legend shows 'CSI 300 (沪深300)' with dashed orange line visible alongside strategy equity curve

assertions.title: ChiNext benchmark line on NAV chart

steps.action: Check NAV chart for ChiNext benchmark line
steps.expected: ChiNext benchmark line overlaid on NAV chart
steps.observed: NAV chart legend shows 'ChiNext (创业板指)' with dotted green line visible alongside strategy equity curve and CSI 300 benchmark

assertions.title: End-to-end backtest flow — user navigates, selects strategy, runs backtest, sees NAV chart with benchmarks, metrics (Sharpe, Sortino, MaxDD, Win Rate), trade list, all no errors

steps.observed: App loaded with sidebar controls: chan_theory strategy, date range pickers, initial capital, Run Backtest button
chan_theory shown as selected strategy
Backtest completed within ~2 seconds: 'Loaded 422 stocks from market.db', '✅ Backtest complete! 4 trades executed.'

steps.expected: Metrics: Sharpe, Sortino, Max Drawdown, Win Rate
steps.observed: All present: Total Return (-13.10%), Sortino Ratio (-3.220), Sharpe Ratio (-2.940), Max Drawdown (-19.00%), Win Rate (0.0%), Trade Count (4)
Chart shows 3 lines: Chan Theory (blue solid), CSI 300 沪深300 (orange dashed), ChiNext 创业板指 (green dotted)
4 trades displayed with Stock, Entry/Exit Dates, Prices, P&L, P&L%, Hold Days
No error banners, no console errors — clean end-to-end flow

assertions.title: Accessible from any browser without installation

steps.action: Open http://localhost:8020 in headless Chromium browser
steps.expected: App loads without requiring any client-side installation
steps.observed: Streamlit app loaded fully in headless Chromium via agent-browser — no installation, plugins, or authentication required. Standard web browser access works.

summary: Tested 11 assertions: 11 passed, 0 failed. All UI elements verified: controls (VAL-UI-001), backtest results (VAL-UI-002), chan_theory strategy (VAL-UI-003), progress feedback (VAL-UI-004), NAV chart (VAL-UI-005), trade list (VAL-UI-006), performance metrics with Sortino Ratio confirmed (VAL-UI-007), CSI 300 benchmark (VAL-BENCH-001), ChiNext benchmark (VAL-BENCH-002), end-to-end flow (VAL-CROSS-001), browser accessibility (VAL-CROSS-002). CRITICAL: Confirmed Sortino Ratio is now displayed instead of CAGR (fix from commit 017652f verified).
